entries.title: COMMENTARY ON PAUL'S EPISTLES on first-corinthians 10:9
entries.excerpt: The Jews were putting Christ to the test, because it was he who spoke to Moses. Paul is warning us here not to do the same as they did.

entries.title: Homily on 1 Corinthians 23 on first-corinthians 10:9
entries.excerpt:
"Neither let us tempt Christ, as some of them also tempted, and perished by serpents."

By this he again hints at another charge which he likewise states at the end, blaming them because they contended about signs. And indeed they were destroyed on account of trials, saying, "when will the good things come? when the rewards?" Wherefore also he adds, on this account correcting and alarming them.

entries.title: Commentary on 1 Corinthians on first-corinthians 10:9
entries.excerpt: He hints that the Corinthians, by demanding signs, are tempting Christ.
